headline: Arm to Sell Its Own Chips, Eyeing Sales Goal of $15 Billion
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Arm Holdings Plc, which made its name licensing technology to semiconductor makers, will begin selling its own chips for the first time, adding a business that it expects to generate about $15 billion annually within five years. Meta Platforms Inc. will be the first major customer for the company’s chip, called an AGI CPU, Arm said Tuesday at an event in San Francisco. The product will have as many as 136 cores — a measure of processing power — and draw 300 watts of electricity, A

headline: AMD and Hammer Distribution Target UK's AI "Power Wall" with New CPU-First Infrastructure Strategy
summary: In the race to build the future of AI, and the shift to inferencing, the industry is at risk of overlooking a critical component: the CPU. Today, Hammer Distribution and AMD are pivoting to a 'CPU-first' strategy not just as a technical choice, but as a survival tactic for UK businesses trapped in the 'time-to-power' crisis. This partnership aims to prove that the secret to unlocking AI isn't more power, but better management of the power we already have.

content.title: AMD and Hammer Distribution Target UK's AI "Power Wall" with New CPU-First Infrastructure Strategy
content.summary: In the race to build the future of AI, and the shift to inferencing, the industry is at risk of overlooking a critical component: the CPU. This partnership aims to prove that the secret to unlocking AI isn't more power, but better management of the power we already have.

headline: Intel stock jumps on report of CPU price hikes
summary: Investing.com -- Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) rose 4% Wednesday, while Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) gained 2.5% after Nikkei reported both chipmakers informed clients of CPU price increases.

headline: Latest News In AI Chips - AI Battles: Real-Time Prediction Markets Transform Social Entertainment
summary: Doppel Games has announced a collaboration with Kash to introduce real-time prediction markets for AI-driven battles in its Agent vs Agent (AvA) competitions, hosted on X (formerly Twitter). This partnership enables live, tradeable outcomes for these AI battles, creating a novel type of social-native entertainment. The matches, which feature AI doppelgangers of well-known personalities, are streamed live, allowing viewers to engage by predicting outcomes directly within their social media...

headline: 3 Stocks Estimated To Be Trading Below Intrinsic Value By Up To 40
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has experienced a 2.3% drop, yet it remains up by 13% over the past year with earnings projected to grow by 16% annually. In this context, identifying stocks that are trading below their intrinsic value can present opportunities for investors seeking to capitalize on potential long-term gains amidst fluctuating market conditions.

headline: The VIX Crashes Out, For Now, on Hope For Peace and Cheaper Oil
summary: The fear gauge pulled back on Wednesday. The CBOE Volatility Index, better known as the VIX, is trading near 25.6 this morning, a drop of roughly 5% from Tuesday’s close of 26.95, as geopolitical optimism and a sharp pullback in oil prices sent investors back into equities. headline: RAMageddon Arrives: AI’s Endless Appetite Just Killed the PC Comeback
summary: The global PC market has clawed its way back from a brutal slump in 2022 and 2023, when shipments cratered amid post-pandemic oversupply, with 2024 delivering modest growth as businesses and consumers began refreshing aging fleets.
